name: Todd McDaniel Golf
address: 315 Great Bridge Blvd D, Chesapeake, VA 23320
about: Todd McDaniel Golf is an indoor golf performance center offering a range of services including simulator bay rentals, club fittings, and lessons. The facility utilizes TrackMan 4 technology, a professional-grade launch monitor, to provide precise data and analysis. Access is primarily through memberships with 3-month or 6-month commitment plans, turning month-to-month afterward, allowing for flexible and dedicated practice schedules.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade TrackMan 4 technology for accurate data
Flexible membership plans with extensive daily access (5am-11pm)
Comprehensive fitting services for clubs optimized for individual play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of a kitchen or food service on site.
No mention of a bar or BYOB policy.

simulator_hardware.notes: The #1 Launch Monitor on the PGA Tour used for fittings and practice.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs for practice, lessons, and simulator rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a food and beverage service at the facility. BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Website content does not specify an average time for a full 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior lessons, making it suitable for younger golfers.
